headline: Nasdaq leads US stocks in monthly gains following April rally
summary: US stocks (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) are on track to post massive monthly gains to close out April, with the Nasdaq Composite rising nearly 20% in that period. Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at the market's monthly performance and the latest moves in the tech sector.

headline: A Look At Micron Technology (MU) Valuation After Its Recent Share Price Surge
summary: Micron Technology (MU) has drawn fresh attention after a strong recent run, with the share price up 61% over the past month and 19% over the past 3 months. Investors are reassessing what this move implies. See our latest analysis for Micron Technology. Micron’s recent momentum stands out, with a 61.1% 1 month share price return and a 64.4% year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return is very large, suggesting investors are reassessing both growth potential and risk. If...

headline: Seagate Is Sold Out Through 2027 As AI Reshapes Hard Drive Demand
summary: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) is sold out. Management confirmed that nearline capacity is almost fully allocated through calendar 2027, a level of forward visibility that is rare for a hardware company. AI infrastructure buildout has consumed supply faster than the industry can respond, and Seagate's Mozaic HAMR (Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording) technology is the primary reason hyperscalers are locking in multi-year contracts. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Micron Technology (MU) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge
summary: If you are wondering whether Micron Technology's share price still offers value after a big run, the key is to look closely at what the current valuation is really pricing in. The stock last closed at US$518.46, with returns of 6.4% over 7 days, 61.1% over 30 days and 64.4% year to date, while the 1 year and 3 year returns are very large and the 5 year return is more than 5x. Recent headlines around Micron have focused on its role in memory and storage for high performance computing and AI...
